name: page-kinetic
title: Motion studio site (kinetic)
description: An animation-forward one-pager from ten kinetic blocks.

files.content:
import { HeaderKinetic } from "@/components/blocks/header-kinetic"
import { HeroKinetic } from "@/components/blocks/hero-kinetic"
import { BentoKinetic } from "@/components/blocks/bento-kinetic"
import { FeatureKinetic } from "@/components/blocks/feature-kinetic"
import { ParallaxKinetic } from "@/components/blocks/parallax-kinetic"
import { StatsKinetic } from "@/components/blocks/stats-kinetic"
import { TestimonialsKinetic } from "@/components/blocks/testimonials-kinetic"
import { PricingKinetic } from "@/components/blocks/pricing-kinetic"
import { CtaKinetic } from "@/components/blocks/cta-kinetic"
import { FooterKinetic } from "@/components/blocks/footer-kinetic"

/**
 * Kinetic motion-studio page (kinetic vibe) — a complete one-pager pre-wired from ten
 * animation-forward blocks. Drop into a `data-vibe="kinetic"` wrapper.
 */
export function PageKinetic() {
  return (
    <main>
      <HeaderKinetic />
      <HeroKinetic />
      <BentoKinetic />
      <FeatureKinetic />
      <ParallaxKinetic />
      <StatsKinetic />
      <TestimonialsKinetic />
      <PricingKinetic />
      <CtaKinetic />
      <FooterKinetic />
    </main>
  )
}

import Link from "next/link" import { Play } from "lucide-react" const COLUMNS = [ { title: "Studio", links: ["Work", "About", "Process", "Careers"] }, { title: "Services", links: ["Brand films", "Title design", "Product motion", "3D"] }, { title: "Connect", links: ["Instagram", "Vimeo", "LinkedIn", "Newsletter"] }, ] /** * Kinetic footer — intentionally still. A bold wordmark over tidy link columns. */ export function FooterKinetic() { return (
Tempo

A motion design studio for brands that refuse to sit still.

{COLUMNS.map((col) => (

{col.title}

    {col.links.map((l) => (
  • {l}
    • ))}
))}
© {new Date().getFullYear()} Tempo Studio Made in motion
) }
